link_rule: Application links must be copied only from job.url. Never construct basf.jobs links.
llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Descriptions are short previews. Fetch detail_path only for shortlisted roles. Copy job URLs exactly from job.url. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Deputy Manager, Business Development
jobs.description_preview: We are looking for a dynamic and commercially driven Deputy Manager – Business Development to lead market expansion, customer engagement, and product development initiatives in Bangladesh’s vegetable seeds business. This role is ideal for professionals passionate about agriculture, sales strategy, dealer development,...
